steps.title: Set the equations equal
steps.content:
Both expressions equal $y$, so set them equal.
$$-\frac{1}{4}x=\frac{1}{6}x$$
Multiplying by $12$ gives
$$-3x=2x$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content:
Graph the two equations exactly as written. The intersection gives the system solution. Algebraically,
$$0=5x$$
$$x=0$$
The answer is B.
